title: Filter by people option on workload dashboard rather than at connected board level
excerpt: It would be so useful to be able to apply a workload dashboard wide filter on a people column rather than having to apply the filter on each individual board that is connected to the dashboard to exclude certain people.

posts.author: Caroline (Caroline Labbett)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be so useful to be able to apply a workload dashboard wide filter on a people column rather than having to apply the filter on each individual board that is connected to the dashboard to exclude certain people.
